title: Electric Heated Socks,Rechargeable 6000mAh Battery Heating Sox for Men & Women - 3 Heating Levels Washable Thermal Foot Warmers for Outdoor Sports (Black rechargeable socks)
features: Machine & Hand Washable | Universal Fit Rechargeable heated socks for men and women, designed for easy care with machine or hand wash functionality. One size fits UK shoe sizes 5-13, ensuring a comfortable fit for most foot sizes.

3-Level Temperature Control | Fast Warmth Adjustable heating levels to suit your comfort: High: 65℃ (5-6h runtime) Medium: 55℃ (7-8h runtime) Low: 45℃ (11h runtime) Feels warm within 20 seconds—ideal for freezing outdoor conditions.

Long-Lasting 6000mAh Battery | Type-C Charging Dual 7.4V 6000mAh rechargeable batteries deliver up to 11 hours on low setting. Dual Type-C ports allow simultaneous charging, saving time for busy users. Relieves arthritis, foot pain, and stiff joints.

Breathable Premium Fabric | Arch Support 80% cotton, 12% polyester, 8% elastane blend for breathability and durability. Thickened spandex offers arch, ankle, and toe support, while removable batteries stay lightweight and unobtrusive.

BOLIHOMES 2025 Upgraded Ring Heating | Christmas Gift U-shaped heating design for even warmth across feet. Ultra-thin wires and inline pads eliminate bulk for natural movement. Perfect Christmas gift for skiing, hiking, hunting, and winter sports—keep loved ones warm all season.
